contract_completeness: No algorithmic default outside this document and the referenced physical-scale contract may affect v1 output.

input.nonfinite_policy: invalid; uint8 is the sole accepted decoded source dtype

operation_order: center crop/pad image and validity mask to 512 by 512
compute population RMS sqrt(mean(centered squared)) on valid pixels
divide valid centered samples by RMS only when RMS > 1e-12; otherwise set normalized image to zero and constant_input=true
set invalid samples to exactly zero
multiply by the frozen window immediately before each FFT

window.application: elementwise after normalization and after any candidate rotation; invalid samples are already zero

fft.output_dtype: complex128 forward and float64 real correlation surface

cross_power.dc_policy: R[0,0] is set to exact complex zero
cross_power.band_mask: inclusive physical radial annulus in physical_scale_contract.json, applied after unit-magnitude normalization
cross_power.negative_correlation_policy: retain signed real inverse-FFT values; do not take magnitude, square, or clip

rotation_search.meaning: reported angle_degrees is the OpenCV-positive counterclockwise angle applied to representation A before estimating the translation to apply to B
rotation_search.warp_function: cv2.warpAffine with dsize=(512,512), flags exactly the interpolation constant, borderMode=cv2.BORDER_CONSTANT, borderValue=0
rotation_search.refinement: If the selected coarse candidate is not an endpoint, derive a separable three-score parabolic offset, clamp it to [-0.5,+0.5] coarse steps, and evaluate that one additional angle only when its absolute offset exceeds 1e-12 degrees.
rotation_search.candidate_objective: frozen raw PSR after overlap policy
rotation_search.tie_rule: For exactly equal finite objective values choose smallest absolute angle, then the numerically smaller angle; an exactly equal refined candidate does not replace the coarse candidate.

translation.integer_peak: np.argmax on the C-order flattened real correlation surface; the first flat index wins an exact surface tie
translation.signed_index: For N=512, index i is i when i<256 and i-512 when i>=256.
translation.meaning: translation_x_px and translation_y_px are the displacement to apply to representation B after A rotation so that B aligns with rotated A.
translation.subpixel: For each axis on cyclic neighbors, delta=0.5*(left-right)/(left-2*center+right); use zero if the denominator is nonfinite or abs(denominator)<=1e-15; clamp delta to [-0.5,+0.5].
translation.reported_value: signed integer coordinate plus subpixel delta
translation.overlap_warp_value: The validity mask uses the reported floating translation directly in cv2.warpAffine.

overlap.rotated_a_mask: A valid mask rotated by the candidate image affine matrix with nearest-neighbor interpolation
overlap.aligned_b_mask: B valid mask translated by (translation_x_px,translation_y_px) using nearest-neighbor cv2.warpAffine, fixed canvas, constant-zero border
overlap.fraction: intersection/denominator, or zero when denominator is zero
overlap.below_minimum: valid comparison with raw_score exactly 0.0 and diagnostic low_overlap=true; it is not a comparison failure

score.name: peak_to_sidelobe_ratio
score.peak_value: real correlation surface at the integer argmax location
score.exclusion: all cyclic samples whose wrapped row and column offsets from the integer peak are each <=5; an 11 by 11 Chebyshev square
score.sidelobe_statistics: float64 population mean and population standard deviation over every nonexcluded surface sample
score.zero_variance_policy: raw_score=0.0 when sidelobe_std is nonfinite or <=1e-12
score.nonfinite_policy: a nonfinite final score is a comparison failure with error_code poc_nonfinite_score

failure_semantics.blank_or_constant: successful zero-energy representation; deterministic finite zero score unless paired data create nonzero eligible cross-power

determinism.candidate_order: frozen ascending coarse sequence followed by at most one refinement
determinism.array_hash: SHA-256 over an ASCII dtype tag, canonical little-endian int64 shape bytes, and C-order array bytes
determinism.representation_hash: SHA-256 canonical JSON of method/version, physical metadata, and component array hashes
determinism.json: ensure_ascii=true, sorted keys, compact separators for hashes; reports use sorted keys and indent two
determinism.tie_rules: explicit in rotation_search and translation sections

cases: partial overlap above and below the minimum
exact tie behavior and repeated execution
synthetic_gates.repeat_equality: exact equality of representation hashes and all nontiming score/transform/overlap diagnostics

sd300_policy.preparation_required_before_any_sd300_pa: all 200 frozen cohort images must prepare successfully

go_requires: complete explicit contract and immutable canonical hashes
rotation and translation sign conventions are proven by synthetic tests
all 200 frozen cohort images prepare successfully without replacement
all permitted smoke scores and diagnostics are finite
identity/self behavior passes the frozen check
smoke scores and transforms do not collapse to one constant result
no choice was tuned on SD300 results
all regression and parity gates pass
no_go_if: any required source, contract, synthetic, physical-scale, preparation, finite-score, identity, repeatability, collapse, benchmark-contract, regression, parity, protected-artifact, or provenance gate fails
an algorithmic parameter is changed after any SD300 method score is viewed
the frozen cohort needs replacement or an input-dependent exception

integrity.canonicalization: UTF-8 JSON, ensure_ascii=true, keys sorted recursively, separators comma and colon; hash the complete document with integrity.canonical_sha256 omitted
